subcodes.first_line: O tree of the garden of God's love! The morn of the Great Glad-Tidings, like unto the shining moon, doth forever and eternally radiate from the horizon of God's Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شجره حدیقه محبت الله صبح بشارت عظمی از افق امرالله چون مه تابان تا ابد الاباد درخشنده است
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @growth of the Cause
